title: Department Manager Vacancy at H&M India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at H&M India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
H&M India Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About H&M India Global Group:
H&M India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
